nodes.label: OtterTune (SIGMOD 2017)
nodes.author: Van Aken, Pavlo, Gordon, Zhang
nodes.rationale: Automatic database management system tuning via Gaussian Process regression and Lasso feature selection. Proposes workload mapping to transfer prior tuning sessions.

nodes.label: Gaussian Process Regression
nodes.rationale: Surrogate model used by OtterTune to predict optimal knob configurations from prior observations.

nodes.label: Lasso Feature Selection
nodes.rationale: Used by OtterTune for automatic knob importance ranking via L1 regularization.
